locations_inspected.name: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc.
findings: Wet Pipe sprinkler system, Viking manufacturer, 28 years old, NFPA 13 compliant
3 control valves inspected, all found in open position
Water flow alarm tested and operational
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: adequate supply
Static Pressure: 89 psi; Residual Pressure: 59 psi; Flow: 1923 GPM
deficiencies: Minor corrosion observed on sprinkler heads
Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: [Advisory] Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
[Priority] Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

overall_assessment.summary: Overall System Status: PASS. Wet pipe sprinkler system is NFPA 13 compliant with adequate water supply. Two deficiencies noted related to electrical conditions.
